name: Slime Scramble
short_description: A cheerful, family-friendly arcade adventure! Guide your slime through fun retro-style arenas, eat and dodge to survive, and enjoy mini-games along the way. Casual, colorful, and suitable for all ages!
detailed_description: Dive into Slime Scramble, a relaxing, cartoony adventure where you play as a little slime with big dreams! Your mission? Gobble up as many green slimes as you can to grow stronger while dodging threats that keep you on your toes. Watch out for the red slimes – they're bigger and not so friendly! But that's not all; airborne Flying Slimes soar above with even more power, while the Poison Jumper Slime, the ultimate threat, jumps into the fray, keeping you alert. How big can you grow before things get too sticky? Find out in this dark, thrilling slime scramble!
about_the_game: Dive into Slime Scramble, a relaxing, cartoony adventure where you play as a little slime with big dreams! Your mission? But that's not all; airborne Flying Slimes soar above with even more power, while the Poison Jumper Slime, the ultimate threat, jumps into the fray, keeping you alert. How big can you grow before things get too sticky? Find out in this dark, thrilling slime scramble!
